tagline: The legacy compute preview system schema is deprecated and will be removed from the system catalog.
what_it_does: The legacy compute preview system schema is deprecated and will be removed from the system catalog. Use the system.compute schema instead. For a list of current system schemas and tables, see System tables reference.
why_it_matters: Use them to monitor costs, audit security events, track compute and job performance, and observe data and AI workloads.
key_takeaway: The legacy compute preview system schema is deprecated and will be removed from the system catalog.
